title: panax quinquefolius var. ginseng
intro: Panax quinquefolius var. ginseng, also known as American ginseng, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Panax. It is a perennial plant native to the forests of eastern North America, with medicinal properties attributed to its roots, which contain compounds called ginsenosides. The health benefits of American ginseng include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress, fatigue, and insomnia. American ginseng is often prepared as a capsule, tea, or tincture, with herbal preparations typically standardized to contain a specific amount of ginsenosides.
